headline: Why Is Coinbase (COIN) Stock Rocketing Higher Today
summary: Shares of blockchain infrastructure company Coinbase (NASDAQ:COIN) jumped 7.6% in the afternoon session after investors grew optimistic about potential regulatory clarity for the crypto industry as the U.S. Senate Banking Committee discussed a market structure bill known as the Clarity Act.

headline: How Low Can BMNR Stock Go?
summary: Bitmine Immersion Technologies (BMNR) Chairman Tom Lee has anchored investor expectations to the "Alchemy of 5%" milestone, acquiring 5.21 million Ethereum tokens to capture 4.31% of the total supply. While institutional resilience remains high following the company's New York Stock Exchange uplisting, the underlying mechanics of this $13.4 billion crypto-and-cash treasury create a symmetric, high-magnitude downside risk.

headline: Stocks Set to Open Lower as Oil Rises Amid Iran Impasse, Nvidia Earnings and Fed Minutes Awaited
summary: June S&P 500 E-Mini futures (ESM26) are down -0.41%, and June Nasdaq 100 E-Mini futures (NQM26) are down -0.30% this morning, pointing to a lower open on Wall Street as oil prices continue to rise amid the stalemate between the U.S. and Iran.
